name: Coffee, Snow, and You
short_description: A warm New Year’s story about a lonely person spending December 31st at work. A short visual novel about finding joy and meaning on the eve of the most magical night of the year.
detailed_description:
Special Offer

⭐⭐⭐ This game is part of the Cozy & Emotional Stories bundle.

Get the complete collection with a discount.


About the Game

On December 31st, life in a big city changes. The air is filled with anticipation of celebration and miracles, so even going to a disliked job doesn’t feel quite so terrible.

The main character is a young man named Tom who works as a barista in a shopping mall. His shift falls on December 31st, so he makes coffee and watches as the world sinks into New Year’s hustle and bustle.

A small story filled with light humor and a heartfelt atmosphere. We hope this visual novel will give you a sense of holiday warmth and remind you that joy can be found in the most unexpected places. Even (sorry) at work.

Features:

  • 3 endings.

  • Warm and cozy visuals.

  • A cute soundtrack.

supported_languages: English, Russian, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Latin America, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Turkish, Japanese
